items.example: I am studying English right now.
She is cooking dinner at the moment.
He is currently working on a project.
Are you listening to the teacher?
They are talking on the phone.
He is running in the park right now.
She is sitting by the window.
Why is he standing in the rain?
She is coming home from school.
He is making a sandwich for lunch.
They are waiting for the bus.
The children are playing in the garden.
She is writing a letter to her friend.
He is typing a report on his computer.
She is using her phone to take photos.
He is drinking coffee at the cafe.
They are eating lunch at the restaurant.
The baby is sleeping in the room.
Why is she crying?
Everyone is laughing at the joke.
The kids are swimming in the pool.
My father is driving to the office.
She is reading a novel by the window.
He is helping his mother with housework.
She is carrying a heavy bag.
